# Source: Malcolm/Suricata+Zeek, last 30 days. Maintained by claude-wazuh.
# SAFE-EXCLUDED: SIP trunk SBCs + any IP that carried RTP voice with the PBX + known-benign (Win Update cache, NinjaRMM).
#
